rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Waste in material or time indicates process improvement opportunity.
suggestedActions: Optimize drying/cooling parameters for cycle time reduction.
Monitor defects and adjust process conditions accordingly.
